STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.WRITE_OFF_PAYMENT_AMOUNT,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.WRITE_OFF_AMOUNT,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.SOURCE_CODE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.COMPETITOR_TYPE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.COMMENTS,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.DATES_NEGATIVE_TOLERANCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.DATES_POSITIVE_TOLERANCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.DATE_TYPE_PREFERENCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.OVER_SHIPMENT_TOLERANCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.UNDER_SHIPMENT_TOLERANCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.OVER_RETURN_TOLERANCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.UNDER_RETURN_TOLERANCE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.ITEM_CROSS_REF_PREF,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.SHIP_SETS_INCLUDE_LINES_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.ARRIVALSETS_INCLUDE_LINES_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.SCHED_DATE_PUSH_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.INVOICE_QUANTITY_RULE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.PRICING_EVENT,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.ACCOUNT_REPLICATION_KEY,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.STATUS_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.AUTOPAY_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.NOTIFY_FLAG,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.LAST_BATCH_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.ORG_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.CREATED_BY_MODULE,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.APPLICATION_ID,
STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.SELLING_PARTY_ID
From
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS,
(
select CUST_ACCOUNT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS
minus
select CUST_ACCOUNT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from
$$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS
) ACM
Where
ACM.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID=STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID and
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
attributes.Post SQL:
UPDATE $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS FROM 
(SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS) IS NULL 
THEN (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_CSF_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS')
ELSE (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS)
END AS MAX_DATE) B
SET LAST_EXTRACT_DATE = B.MAX_DATE
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_CSF_HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS'
